allow: PowerShell(php -l app/Services/DictionaryDedupeService.php; php artisan pdts:dedupe-dictionary | Out-File -Encoding utf8 storage/dd_check.txt; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content storage/dd_check.txt | Select-String "SUMMARY|PLANNED MERGES|Strontium"; Remove-Item storage/dd_check.txt -Force)

PowerShell(php -l app/Services/DictionaryDedupeService.php; php artisan pdts:dedupe-dictionary | Out-File -Encoding utf8 storage/dd_check.txt; "cmd exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content storage/dd_check.txt | Select-String "SUMMARY"; Remove-Item storage/dd_check.txt -Force)
